mapper.update: update setmeal set category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} where id = #{id}
update setmeal set status =#{status},update_time=#{updateTime} where id =#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from setmeal where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select s.id, category_id , s.name, price, s.status, description, image, s.update_time ,c.name categoryName from setmeal s left join category c on s.category_id = c.id where s.id=#{id}
